resources.string: The machine generated a secret color code. Your mission is to guess what those colors are and in what order they appear.
To enter an attempt, simply tap the available colors to fill the spaces in the row below them. When you have your combination ready, confirm the play.
After each attempt, you will receive clues that tell you how you did:
Correct colors: This means you guessed a color and also its exact position.
Partially correct colors: This means you guessed a color, but you put it in the wrong place.
The username needs at least one character
